summary: “It’s clear to us that the world is short compute right now, and the industry is racing to catch up,” Rob Bittencourt, partner and head of thematic investing at Apollo, tells Bloomberg Intelligence’s Alexandra Davidov and Paul Gulberg on this episode of the Tech Disruptors podcast. Bittencourt discusses why AI is becoming a private-credit story, with trillions of dollars of data-center, power, chip and infrastructure investment needed to support the next phase of adoption. He also explains how A

title: Vanguards of Health Care: Restor3D Personalizes Orthopedics
title_cn: 医疗保健先锋：Restor3D 个性化骨科
summary: “If you plan, the cases can go much more smoothly. And if you have patient-specific instrumentation, they can go much more quickly” says restor3D’s CEO Kurt Jacobus in this episode of Vanguards of Healthcare. He sat down with BI analyst Matt Henriksson to elaborate on personalized orthopedic implants, outlining how the win for the surgeon is the capacity to complete more cases — with better patient outcomes reputationally — and the win for the facility is getting another case into the operating

title: Heat Pumps and the Economics of Clean Heating (Podcast)
title_cn: 热泵和清洁供暖的经济性（播客）
summary: Heat pumps are at a crossroads. After a decade of growth, global sales fell in 2025 as weaker construction activity weighed on key markets. Yet the longer-term picture remains resilient. Heat pumps have continued to gain ground against fossil fuel heating in several regions, while Europe remains a focal point for adoption, shaped by a shifting mix of subsidies, energy prices and consumer demand. So what is driving heat pump uptake today, and what will determine whether electrified heating can mo

title_cn: 拉丁美洲货币脆弱反弹，跑赢其他国家
summary: Emerging-market currencies trimmed losses on Thursday, with Latin American names outperforming peers as falling US Treasury yields helped improve sentiment despite persistent geopolitical concerns.

title: Stocks Get AI Boost in Countdown to SpaceX Debut: Markets Wrap
title_cn: SpaceX 首次亮相倒计时，人工智能提振股市：市场总结
summary: Wall Street traders gearing up for SpaceX’s historic debut sent stocks higher ahead of what’s expected to be a major test of investor appetite for artificial intelligence-related companies.

title: Wall Street Looks for Proof of AI Profit
title_cn: 华尔街寻找人工智能利润的证据
summary: Franklin Templeton Senior Investment Strategist Katrina Dudley joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why Wall Street is no longer rewarding AI spending without proof of profits. She compares SpaceX's massive investments to the railroad boom, and argues that AI is enhancing worker productivity rather than eliminating jobs. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Veja os Assuntos que Marcaram a Semana no Brasil
title_cn: 查看巴西本周的热点话题
summary: Confira o que foi destaque da semana no Brasil com Beatriz Reis. Edição de Patricia Xavier e produção de Barbara Nascimento e Meg Lopes.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Citigroup Seeks $5 Billion From Year’s First High-Grade Bonds
title_cn: 花旗集团寻求从今年第一批高等级债券中筹集 50 亿美元
summary: Citigroup Inc. is seeking to raise about $5 billion from its first investment-grade bond sale of 2026, according to people with direct knowledge of the matter.

title: Gold Swings in Volatile Session After Fresh US-Iran Strikes
title_cn: 美伊新一轮袭击后黄金在波动中波动
summary: Gold fluctuated after hitting the lowest since November, following a fresh round of US strikes against Iran that raised the stakes in a war that has roiled global markets and stoked inflation.

title: SpaceX IPO Could Test Market, Says 1789 Capital’s Abrahimzadeh
title_cn: 1789 Capital 的 Abrahimzadeh 表示 SpaceX IPO 可以测试市场
summary: The public debut of SpaceX is poised to become a major test of investor appetite and market infrastructure, according to 1789 Capital partner Paul Abrahimzadeh, whose firm counts the company as its largest portfolio holding.

title: Oracle Bonds Rally as It Signals Disciplined Funding Outlook
title_cn: 甲骨文债券上涨，表明融资前景受到纪律约束
summary: Oracle Corp. bonds rallied on Thursday even as its shares tumbled, after the database giant calmed debt investors by saying it doesn’t expect additional bond issuance this calendar year and outlining plans to raise $40 billion of debt and equity in the current fiscal year.

title: N.O.R.E. & DJ EFN Want To Become the Def Jam of Podcasts
title_cn: N.O.R.E. EFN 和 DJ 想要成为播客界的 Def Jam
summary: After hitting 500 episodes, Rapper N.O.R.E & DJ EFN, hosts of the show ‘Drink Champs,' discuss what they wanted from the show when it first started, and how it came to be. The two discuss their music careers, hip-hop culture, and their experience navigating the business side of it all. They speak with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Swings in Thin Trade as US Threatens Key Iranian Export Hub
title_cn: 由于美国威胁伊朗主要出口中心，石油贸易清淡波动
summary: Oil flipped between gains and losses in thin trading as traders weighed US President Donald Trump’s threats to step up attacks on key Iranian energy infrastructure.

title: What Will Be The Legacy of the 2026 World Cup?
title_cn: 2026 年世界杯将留下什么遗产？
summary: What is the legacy of the 2026 World Cup: expensive tickets or finally growing soccer in the US? On this week's episode of The Deal, Jason Kelly and Alex Rodriguez asked The Athletic's Henry Bushnell if ticket prices will ultimately drown out everything else. Listen to the full interview wherever you get your podcasts. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ECB Likely Needs to Keep Hiking After Thursday’s Move, IMF Says
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织表示，周四行动后欧洲央行可能需要继续加息
summary: The European Central Bank will need to raise borrowing costs again, the International Monetary Fund said just hours after officials in Frankfurt delivered a quarter-point hike.

title: ECB Officials See Next Rate Increase Possible as Soon as July
title_cn: 欧洲央行官员预计下一次加息最早可能在 7 月
summary: European Central Bank officials aren’t ruling out a second increase in interest rates as soon as their next monetary-policy meeting, according to people familiar with the situation.

title: US Stocks Gain, Halting Two-Day Drop, as Chip Bellwethers Rise
title_cn: 随着芯片领头羊的上涨，美国股市上涨，结束了两天的下跌
summary: US stocks edged higher following two straight sessions of declines, as investors assessed developments in the Middle East and a report that showed US producer prices climbed at the fastest pace in more than three years.

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 6/11/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 6 月 11 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Your ETF of the Month: Software Isn’t Dead Yet
title_cn: 本月您的 ETF：软件尚未消亡
summary: This fund proves that the industry’s demise at the hands of artificial intelligence has been somewhat exaggerated.

title: Why Tomatoes Are the Most Expensive They’ve Been in Four Decades
title_cn: 为什么西红柿是四年来最贵的
summary:
In April, the price of tomatoes was around $2.69 per pound — the highest seen in some four decades. So what's driving the price spike?

Jacob Krempel, senior vice president of procurement and merchandising at the wholesale food distributor Baldor, joins Tracy Alloway and Joe Weisenthal to unpack why consumers are paying more and more at the grocery store. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SEC Proposes to Scrap Trade-Through Rule for Equities Execution
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会提议废除股票执行的交易规则
summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission proposed eliminating a rule that aims to ensure investors get better prices for their transactions.

title: Supreme Court Shields Investment Funds From Some Shareholder Suits
title_cn: 最高法院保护投资基金免受一些股东诉讼
summary: The US Supreme Court shielded funds from some investor lawsuits in a 6-3 vote, blocking activist investors from suing 11 closed-end funds. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Boom Stokes Inflation With Memory Chips at ‘Insane’ Prices
title_cn: 人工智能的繁荣引发了内存芯片价格“疯狂”的通货膨胀
summary: When Chris Barber, who’s been in the computer business for a quarter-century, says he’s never seen anything like the AI boom, he’s not talking about its potential to transform the future. He means what it’s doing to hardware prices right now.

title: Treasuries Rise on Lower Oil Prices, Mixed Inflation Readings
title_cn: 油价下跌和通胀数据好坏参半，国债上涨
summary: Treasuries rose as a drop in oil prices improved the outlook for US inflation.

title: Oracle Falls on Data Center Spending; Hugo Boss, Stitch Fix Rally | Stock Movers
title_cn: 甲骨文数据中心支出下降； Hugo Boss，Stitch Fix Rally |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Oracle (ORCL) shares are lower after the company reported quarterly capital expenses that were higher than estimates. The company expects to spend about $70 billion on net capital expenditures in the current fiscal year, which ends in May 2027.

- Hugo Boss (BOSS) shares are moving on news Frasers Group Plc offered to buy the rest of Hugo Boss AG for about €2 billion ($2.3 billion) as billionaire Mike Ashley seeks to add another fashion brand to his growing collection.

- Stitch Fix (SFIX) shares are moving as it bumped up its fiscal-year outlook after revenue rose in its latest quarter, citing a boost from efforts to improve its customer experience and assortment. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Treated as ‘Simply Too Risky’ for Funds With Governance Mandates
title_cn: SpaceX 被视为具有治理授权的基金“风险太大”
summary: The list of sustainability-focused fund managers opting to blacklist SpaceX is growing, as they contemplate the unprecedented level of control that Elon Musk will hold over the rockets-to-chatbot behemoth.

title: Europe Set to Get Rare Oman, UAE Oil as China Curbs Purchases
title_cn: 随着中国限制购买，欧洲将获得稀有的阿曼和阿联酋石油
summary: A wave of oil from the Middle East is set to arrive in Europe next month, a tangible example of how a collapse in Chinese imports is helping other countries to cope with the unprecedented supply disruption wrought by the Iran war.

title: Private Markets on Asia Conviction
title_cn: 私人市场对亚洲的信心
summary: Jenny Lee, Senior Managing Partner, Granite Asia and Mingchen Xia, Managing Director & Co-Head of Asia Investments, Hamilton Lane struck a bullish tone on the private credit market speaking with Bloomberg’s Lulu Chen at Bloomberg Invest 2026 in Hong Kong.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Zambia’s Bond Buyback Hands More Impetus to 39% Local-Debt Rally
title_cn: 赞比亚债券回购为当地债务反弹39%提供更多动力
summary: Zambia’s world-beating local debt may be poised for further gains after the government’s success buying back a potentially costly dollar bond.

title: SpaceX Valuation Is Cheap for Space Peers But Pricey as AI Stock
title_cn: SpaceX 的估值对于太空同行来说很便宜，但对于人工智能股票来说却很昂贵
summary: The jury is still out on whether SpaceX is primarily a rocket company, as its name suggests, or actually more of a telecom provider or artificial intelligence play. Its expected valuation doesn’t help resolve the confusion.

title: SpaceX IPO Will Mint Billions for a New Silicon Valley Hierarchy
title_cn: SpaceX IPO 将为新硅谷阶层创造数十亿美元
summary: The initial public offering for SpaceX is poised to generate billions of dollars in profits for the fortunate few investors who got in early on Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence company.

title: DigitalBridge CEO Dismisses Data Centers in Space
title_cn: DigitalBridge 首席执行官放弃太空数据中心
summary: DigitalBridge CEO Marc Ganzi joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why AI’s next bottleneck is power, not just chips or data centers. He breaks down the ArcLight acquisition, the company’s massive gigawatt pipeline, and why he thinks space-based data centers are still more “science project” than real infrastructure strategy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jeff Bezos’ AI Startup Valued at $41 Billion in Funding Round
title_cn: 杰夫·贝索斯 (Jeff Bezos) 的人工智能初创公司本轮融资估值达 410 亿美元
summary: Prometheus, an artificial intelligence startup led by Jeff Bezos, has raised a round of funding that values it at $41 billion, bolstering the Amazon.com Inc. founder’s status as a significant player in the AI boom.

title: Key Tether Executive Leaves to Rejoin PE Firm He Launched
title_cn: Tether 关键高管离职，重新加入他创办的私募股权公司
summary: Tether Holdings SA Chief Business Officer Benjamin Habbel has stepped down nine months after joining the stablecoin giant, where he was in charge of expanding the firm and its portfolio of investments.

title: Waymo Debuts $30 Invite-Only Membership With Cash Back, Faster Pickups
title_cn: Waymo 推出 30 美元仅限受邀会员，提供现金返还和提货速度更快
summary: Waymo, Alphabet Inc.’s robotaxi unit, is introducing a $30 monthly membership program that promises faster pickup times and credits toward future rides, among other perks aimed at its most frequent users.

title: Novo Detects Unauthorized Access to Some Internal IT Systems
title_cn: Novo 检测到对某些内部 IT 系统的未经授权访问
summary: Novo Nordisk A/S said it had identified unauthorized access to some IT systems the drugmaker uses for its global business.

title: Crusoe Pushed Aside at Wyoming AI Project After Google Concerns
title_cn: 由于谷歌的担忧，克鲁索放弃了怀俄明州人工智能项目
summary: Data center upstart Crusoe is being pushed aside at an artificial intelligence campus it was developing in Wyoming after failing to lock in customers including Alphabet Inc.’s Google, according to people familiar with the situation.

title: Mizuho's Katz: AI Is Imacting Every Sector in the Global Economy
title_cn: 瑞穗银行的卡茨：人工智能正在影响全球经济的各个部门
summary: Mizuho Americas Head of Investment & Corporate Banking Michal Katz discusses the future of artificial intelligence at the Mizuho Technology Conference. She discusses how the adoption of AI can change the landscape of businesses, but also the economies of countries around the world. She speaks with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CoreWeave AI Funding Goes Global With First Euro Junk-Bond Deal
title_cn: CoreWeave AI 融资通过首笔欧洲垃圾债券交易走向全球
summary: Cloud-computing giants powering the artificial intelligence boom are tapping global debt markets to fund hundreds of billions of dollars needed for data centers, chips and other infrastructure. Junk-rated CoreWeave Inc. is now following their lead.

title: OpenAI to Acquire Cloud Platform Ona to Support AI Agents
title_cn: OpenAI 将收购云平台 Ona 以支持人工智能代理
summary: OpenAI has agreed to acquire Ona, a startup that offers cloud services to support artificial intelligence agents, part of a bid by the AI developer to make its technology more useful for businesses.

title: NTT Unit Said to Seek $1 Billion to Develop Data Centers in US
title_cn: NTT 部门据称将寻求 10 亿美元在美国开发数据中心
summary: NTT Global Data Centers, a unit of Japan’s NTT Inc., is seeking at least $1 billion in fresh capital to fund development projects in the US, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Richards Says SpaceX Is Biggest Rising Star of All Time
title_cn: 理查兹称 SpaceX 是有史以来最大的新星
summary: Marathon Asset Management CEO, Chairman and co-founder Bruce Richards says SpaceX's level of debt are normal ahead of its expected initial public offering. He says the company is very well positioned across the board. He speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: True 'FOMO' Is Still Ahead of Us, Emanuel Says
title_cn: 伊曼纽尔说，真正的“FOMO”仍然在我们面前
summary: The bull market has room to run says Evercore's Julian Emanuel. “I would say that the true FOMO — the wild-eyed, buy at any cost, whatever it is I’ll take it — is still potentially ahead of us,” Emanuel said on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oracle Falls Most in Six Months on Mounting Data Center Costs
title_cn: 由于数据中心成本不断上升，甲骨文股价出现六个月来最大跌幅
summary: Oracle Corp. shares declined by the most in six months after the company reported quarterly capital expenses that were higher than estimates, raising investor concerns about the profitability of the AI infrastructure business.

title: Software Stock Reversal Has Traders Bracing for More Pain Ahead
title_cn: 软件股反转让交易者做好迎接未来更多痛苦的准备
summary: A recent rally in software stocks is proving to be short-lived, and investors are bracing for more selling as fears linger about artificial intelligence disruption.

title: DoorDash Built an AI Chatbot to Help With Orders, Reservations and Grocery Lists
title_cn: DoorDash 构建了一个 AI 聊天机器人来帮助处理订单、预订和杂货清单
summary: DoorDash Inc. introduced an in-app artificial intelligence chatbot to help customers make restaurant and grocery orders, and suggested the technology could also be used to unlock new enterprise revenue streams.

title: Amazon Says Its Data Centers Use 2.5 Billion Gallons of Water
title_cn: 亚马逊表示其数据中心使用了 25 亿加仑的水
summary: Amazon.com Inc. said its data centers used 2.5 billion gallons of water worldwide last year, or about 5% of the amount metro Seattle consumes annually.

title: OpenAI's Osborne on Governments Adopting AI
title_cn: OpenAI 的 Osborne 谈政府采用人工智能
summary: OpenAI Head of Countries and former UK Chancellor of the Exchequer George Osborne says that while many countries have talked about adopting AI there are many still in process who haven't delivered on the adoption yet. He adds that governments that do adopt the new technologies more quickly will be the big winners when it comes to the economy and public services. He spoke with Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie from the Founders Forum in Oxfordshire, UK. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Energy Regulator Warns Data Centers Are Hoarding Grid Capacity
title_cn: 英国能源监管机构警告数据中心正在囤积电网容量
summary: The UK’s energy regulator is concerned that data centers are reserving large amounts of grid capacity years before fully needed, further threatening the efficiency of networks facing long queues for new supply.

title: Apollo Is Screening All Software Investments for AI Threat Risk
title_cn: Apollo 正在筛查所有软件投资的人工智能威胁风险
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. is assessing every new investment opportunity in the software industry for AI disruption risk, as asset managers try to quell investor concerns that rapid advances in the technology could make businesses obsolete.

title: Anduril Open to Building Weapons Hub Outside US, CEO Says
title_cn: 安杜里尔首席执行官表示，对在美国境外建立武器中心持开放态度
summary: Anduril Industries Inc. Chief Executive Officer Brian Schimpf says the company would "absolutely" consider building its next weapons manufacturing hub outside the US. Speaking to Bloomberg News Editor-in-Chief John Micklethwait at Founders Forum in the UK, Schimpf adds "there's a lot of manufacturing talent that exists" across Europe.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Investor’s $18 Billion Fundraising Haul Defies AI Fears
title_cn: 科技投资者 180 亿美元融资无视人工智能恐惧
summary: Technology-focused Francisco Partners collected more than $18 billion for two private equity funds, capturing its biggest-ever haul despite a challenging time for buyouts.

title: US Premarket Movers for June 11, 2026
title_cn: 2026 年 6 月 11 日美国上市前走势
summary: S&P 500 Index futures rise 0.7% as of 7:47 a.m. in New York as the latest US strikes against Iran came to a swift end.

title: Anduril CEO Says He’s Open to Building Weapons Hub Outside of US
title_cn: 安杜里尔首席执行官表示他对在美国境外建立武器中心持开放态度
summary: Anduril Industries Inc., one of the world’s most valuable defense-tech startups, would “absolutely” consider building its next weapons manufacturing hub outside the US, said Chief Executive Officer Brian Schimpf.

title: Data Center Battery Maker ZincFive to Merge With SparkLabs SPAC
title_cn: 数据中心电池制造商 ZincFive 将与 SparkLabs SPAC 合并
summary: ZincFive Inc., a specialized battery maker supplying data centers, has agreed to go public through a merger with a blank-check company backed by SparkLabs Group at a pre-money valuation of $600 million.

title: ShopMy Turns Everyone Into an Influencer Seeking a Commission
title_cn: ShopMy 将每个人变成寻求佣金的影响者
summary: The site raises questions about the motives behind product recommendations

title: The Cost of AI Is Showing Up in Inflation
title_cn: 人工智能的成本体现在通货膨胀中
summary: The massive buildout of data centers is driving up costs for critical hardware used in phones, computers and cars.

title: AI Sparks Alarm in China With Call to Protect Worker Rights
title_cn: 人工智能在中国引发警报，呼吁保护工人权利
summary: China’s rapid adoption of artificial intelligence in the workplace has prompted an unusually blunt call from a state-run newspaper to protect labor rights, as Beijing considers how to contain risks posed by the new technology.

title: Grindr CEO Wants His Dating App to Become a Gay Culture Hub
title_cn: Grindr 首席执行官希望他的约会应用程序成为同性恋文化中心
summary: Madonna made a surprise appearance in Times Square last week, promoting her latest album, Confessions II. It was a marketing win for the pop star — and an even bigger one for Grindr Inc.

title: Cepeda Seeks Criminal Charges For Rival in Colombia Election
title_cn: 塞佩达对哥伦比亚选举中的竞争对手寻求刑事指控
summary: Colombian presidential candidate Iván Cepeda said he will seek criminal charges against his opponent Abelardo de la Espriella over allegations he received funds from illegal armed groups.

title: Supreme Court Shields Investment Funds From Shareholder Lawsuits
title_cn: 最高法院保护投资基金免受股东诉讼
summary: The US Supreme Court shielded funds from some investor lawsuits, ruling that an 86-year-old federal statute doesn’t authorize shareholders to sue over bylaws and management decisions.

title: EU Budget Plan Shrinks as Wealthier States Push Back on Spending
title_cn: 随着富裕国家削减支出，欧盟预算计划缩减
summary: European Union leaders are set to discuss a smaller long-term budget when they meet next week, as richer countries balk at footing the bill for most of the bloc’s enlarged spending plan.

title: Fujimori Takes Thin Lead in Final Stretch of Peru Vote Count
title_cn: 藤森在秘鲁计票最后阶段以微弱优势领先
summary: Conservative Keiko Fujimori retook a razor-thin lead in Peru’s tight presidential runoff in its final stretch, as strong support from Peruvians living abroad put her within a hair of winning the country’s top job.

title: Mexico Readies for World Cup Opening Game as Protests Unfold
title_cn: 随着抗议活动的展开，墨西哥为世界杯揭幕战做好准备
summary: With hours to go before the World Cup kicks off in the Mexican capital, preparations shifted into high gear including large security deployments as a series of planned local protests threaten headaches for both football fans and authorities.

title: Surveillance Power Set to Lapse in Fight Over Trump Spy Chief
title_cn: 特朗普间谍头子之争将导致监视权力丧失
summary: Legal authority for US spy agencies’ broadest communications surveillance program is on track to lapse as the fight over President Donald Trump’s decision to temporarily place controversial housing official Bill Pulte in charge of the nation’s intelligence apparatus intensified.

title: Midterm Election Ad Buys to Beat 2024, Hit Record $11.6 Billion
title_cn: 中期选举广告购买额突破 2024 年，创 116 亿美元新纪录
summary: Total spending on advertising in this year’s midterm elections is on track to hit $11.6 billion, shattering the record set by the 2024 presidential election cycle, according to a new estimate by analytics firm AdImpact.

title: Air Quality Alert Prompts Partial Shelter in Place at Pentagon
title_cn: 空气质量警报提示五角大楼设立部分避难所
summary: Hazmat crews and emergency medical teams descended on the Pentagon on Thursday after an air-quality alert prompted a shelter-in-place order for part of the iconic Defense Department headquarters.

title: EU Powers Skeptical of Budget Leeway for Energy Crisis Aid
title_cn: 欧盟对能源危机援助的预算余地持怀疑态度
summary: Several European Union countries are expressing concerns about the bloc’s move to loosen budget rules as the Iran war squeezes markets, arguing the continent may be eroding its fiscal discipline.

title: India Bought Russian Oil From 2022 on US Request, Minister Says
title_cn: 部长表示，印度应美国要求从 2022 年起购买俄罗斯石油
summary: India bought oil from Russia 2022 onwards because it was cheap and available, and did so at the request of the US to keep global oil prices low, India’s foreign minister S. Jaishankar said.

title: Trump Administration Is Appealing Ruling on $100,000 H-1B Fee
title_cn: 特朗普政府对 10 万美元 H-1B 费用的裁决提出上诉
summary: The Trump administration will appeal a federal judge’s order striking down a $100,000 fee for H-1B visa applications.

title: Third Tanker With Indian Seafarers Attacked in Gulf of Oman
title_cn: 第三艘载有印度海员的油轮在阿曼湾遭到袭击
summary: A third tanker carrying Indian crew was struck by American forces in the Gulf of Oman this week, intensifying concerns over maritime trade security as the conflict escalates in the Middle East.

title: Trump Vows New Attacks on Iran, Threatens Key Energy Targets
title_cn: 特朗普誓言对伊朗发动新的攻击，威胁关键能源目标
summary: President Donald Trump said the US would strike Iran again Thursday and sought to crank up pressure on the Islamic Republic to reach a deal by threatening to take control of key energy infrastructure in the country.

title: UK Defense Chief Quits With Attack on Starmer Over Spending
title_cn: 英国防长辞职，攻击斯塔默开支过多
summary: Defence Secretary John Healey quit the UK government after a months-long spending row with the Treasury came to a head, in a move that dramatically dents Keir Starmer’s authority just as rivals are lining up to challenge for his job.

title: Florida Property Tax Cut Could Strain Local Credit, S&P Says
title_cn: 标准普尔表示，佛罗里达州房产税削减可能会给当地信贷带来压力
summary: Local governments in Florida will face “greater credit pressure” if voters approve a plan to largely eliminate property taxes on more than half of homes in the state, according to analysts at S&P Global Ratings.

title: Trump, Modi Look to Patch Up Ties in Shadow of New US Strikes
title_cn: 特朗普和莫迪希望在美国新一轮打击的阴影下修复关系
summary: A possible meeting next week between Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and US President Donald Trump offers a chance to reset ties following a year of strained relations over tariffs, Pakistan, and now, the Iran war.

title: US Sees $13.7 Billion Bill to Boost F-35 Readiness, GAO Says
title_cn: 美国政府问责局表示，美国将拨款 137 亿美元加强 F-35 战备状态
summary: The Air Force, Navy and Marine Corps need to spend an additional $13.7 billion through 2031 to boost declining readiness rates of the F-35 jet, the world’s biggest weapons program, the Pentagon told congressional auditors.

title: Trump-Infantino Relationship Is 'Odd,' Lineker Says
title_cn: 莱因克尔称特朗普与因凡蒂诺的关系“奇怪”
summary: Former England footballer and broadcaster Gary Linker talks with Mishal Husain about controversies surrounding the World Cup, including pricing, and the relationship between US President Donald Trump and FIFA President Gianni Infantino. "I find it very peculiar and very odd," Lineker says. "I think we call him Sycophant-ino now," he adds. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UAE and Iran Meet Face-to-Face to Try to Deescalate Tensions
title_cn: 阿联酋和伊朗面对面会谈，试图缓和紧张局势
summary: Senior national security officials from the United Arab Emirates and Iran held a face-to-face meeting for the first time since the start of the US-Israeli war against Tehran, according to people with knowledge of the situation.

title: ECB's Lagarde Warns of Impact of Prolonged Energy Shock
title_cn: 欧洲央行拉加德警告长期能源冲击的影响
summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde says euro-zone inflation should return to the 2% target by the second half of 2027, warning that a prolonged war in Iran, and subsequent impact on energy prices, would be a drag on growth. She made the comments at a news conference in Frankfurt after policymakers raised interest rates for the first time in almost three years, to 2.25% from 2%. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US, Canada Delay Opening of Bridge Trump Threatened to Block
title_cn: 美国和加拿大推迟大桥开放 特朗普威胁要封锁
summary: The US and Canada are delaying the opening of a new C$6.4 billion ($4.6 billion) bridge connecting Michigan and Ontario, which President Donald Trump has previously threatened to block.

title: Trump Says US Will Hit Iran 'Very Hard' Tonight
title_cn: 特朗普称美国今晚将“非常严厉”打击伊朗
summary: President Donald Trump said the US would strike Iran again Thursday and threatened to take control of the country’s energy infrastructure including the key oil export hub of Kharg Island “at some point.” Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall has the latest.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Will There Be Another Brexit Referendum?
title_cn: 还会有另一次脱欧公投吗？
summary: Alastair Campbell, co-host The Rest Is Politics, and Sir Jacob Rees-Mogg, presenter for GB News, talk about if there should be another Brexit vote and if the results would be different this time. They speak to Mishal Husain at a Bloomberg.com subscriber-only event held in London on June 10. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ECB Raises Rates for First Time Since 2023
title_cn: 欧洲央行自 2023 年以来首次加息
summary: The European Central Bank raised interest rates for the first time in almost three years, concluding it can no longer ignore the upswing in inflation caused by the Iran war. The deposit rate was lifted to 2.25% from 2%. Bloomberg's Oliver Crook reports from Frankfurt. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starmer Crisis Throws Further Doubt on Thames Water Deal
title_cn: 斯塔默危机让泰晤士水务交易进一步受到质疑
summary: The future of Thames Water, which has been on the brink of collapse for more than two years, has been thrown further into doubt by a possible change in UK prime minister, according to a person familiar with the matter.

title: UK Minister Stands By Defense Funding as Healey Resigns
title_cn: 希利辞职后英国部长支持国防经费
summary: UK Business Secretary Peter Kyle reacts to the resignation of Defense Secretary John Healey from Prime Minister Keir Starmer's cabinet. Healey cited the constraints placed on his long-delayed defense investment plan by the chancellor of the exchequer. "All I can say is that we are in a moment in time when we are investing enormously into our defense," Kyle says in an interview with Bloomberg's Lizzy Burden at the Founders Forum event, outside London. "I don't know the circumstances of John's resignation, because I've just heard it the same time you've read it out there." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe Is Finally, Slowly Getting Its Act Together
title_cn: 欧洲终于慢慢地齐心协力
summary:
EU leaders say the bloc needs bigger banks, bigger tech firms, bigger defense contractors and bigger investments. 

Stephen Carroll explains how Europe is trying to protect itself as the global order disintegrates and China drives deeper into its traditional markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Trump Has Cuba in His Sights
title_cn: 为什么特朗普将古巴纳入他的视线
summary: The dispatching of top officials underscores the island remains a top US target

title: Hong Kong Hedge Fund Managers Set for Pay Bump in Tax Plan
title_cn: 香港对冲基金经理将在税收计划中加薪
summary: Hedge fund managers in Hong Kong are set to benefit from a change to the city’s tax laws that will effectively eliminate levies on performance-related income for some funds.

title: Trump Vows to Strike Iran Thursday If It Holds Out on Deal
title_cn: 特朗普誓言如果伊朗坚持达成协议，周四将对其进行打击
summary: US President Donald Trump said he will continue bombing Iran if it refuses to agree to an interim peace deal, following a second night of clashes between the countries’ forces.
